creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 202242
Always install completions

Hi!

The ports currently does not align with what the porter's handbook says:

> When available, completion files should always be installed. It is not
> necessary to make an option for it. If an option is used, though, always enable
> it in OPTIONS_DEFAULT.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/book.html#shell-completion

The attached patch drops the BASH and ZSH options to unconditionally install completion files.
